title: Think Tank Wither
description: The resource pack will add to wither a Think Tank model from the Fallout: New Vegas.
body:
# Think Tank Wither

The resource pack will add to wither a Think Tank model from the Fallout: New Vegas.

Need Optifine.

## Features

- Replaces the Wither model and its projectiles.
- Animated brain and monitors

## Screenshot
